reviews.comment:
Todo lo que necesita un viajero.
Excelente servicio y cordialidad
Tiene lavadero de autos, lubricentro, maxikiosco, se puede desayunar, almorzar o cenar comidas rápidas. A la entrada de Villa Carlos Paz.

(Translated by Google)
Everything a traveler needs.
Excellent service and friendliness.
It has a car wash, a lube center, a convenience store, and a convenience store. You can enjoy breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Located at the entrance to Villa Carlos Paz.
